name: Mrs Fields Carrot Fruit Jumbles
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a medium bowl, combine flour, soda, baking powder, cloves, cinnamon, salt and oats. Mix well with a wire whisk and set aside.
3. In a large bowl with an electric mixer, blend sugars until combined.
4. Add butter and mix to form a grainy paste. Scrape down sides of the bowl.
5. Add eggs and vanilla, and beat at medium speed until light and fluffy.
6. Add carrots, pineapple and nuts, and blend until combined. The batter will appear lumpy.
7. Gradually add flour mixture and blend at low speed until just combined.
8. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of dough onto ungreased baking sheets, 1 1/2 inches apart.
9. Bake for 13-15 minutes, taking care not to brown the cookies.
10. Immediately transfer cookies with a spatula to a cool, flat surface.
